assertions.assertion: Output uses WebApplication.CreateBuilder (minimal hosting) instead of the Startup class pattern
Output calls builder.Services.AddIdentityServer() with Duende namespace instead of IdentityServer4
Output calls AddConfigurationStore and AddOperationalStore with UseSqlServer and MigrationsAssembly configuration
Output includes UseIdentityServer() in the middleware pipeline after UseRouting() and before UseAuthorization()
Output removes AddDeveloperSigningCredential() or replaces it with Duende key management
